channel.title: Game Changer
channel.description: Latest releases from Game Changer on Dropout.tv

item.title: Who Wants to Be Jacob Wysocki?
item.description:
Kimia, Jeremy, Jacob, and Kurt compete in the ultimate quiz show.

Duration: 49:14

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, mad skills, unscripted, kimia behpoornia, jeremy culhane, jacob wysocki, kurt maloney, ash kron, nico romero

item.title: Behind the Scenes of "Fool's Gold"
item.description:
A behind the scenes look at Game Changer's "Fool's Gold."

Duration: 17:24

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, butthole, mad skills, unscripted, ryan creamer, ash kron, sam geer, chloe badner, kevin stiller, jessyka blanco, justin cyrul, paul robalino, melina caron, rebecca snowden, ike flitcraft, behind the scenes

item.title: Fool's Gold
item.description:
Trapp, Rekha, and Jordan invest in the next Dropout viral video.

Duration: 45:05

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, mad skills, unscripted, mike trapp, rekha shankar, jordan myrick, ash kron, nico romero, paul robalino
